subject: Your Post-{{treatment_name}} Care Guide from Rani
preheader: Everything you need to know for optimal recovery and results after your treatment today.
htmlContent:
RANI

BEAUTY CLINIC

Thank you for visiting us today, {{first_name}}.

Here is your personalized aftercare guide following your {{treatment_name}} treatment. Following these instructions carefully will help ensure the best possible results.

Botox Aftercare

First 4 Hours:
- Remain upright. Do not lie down or bend over for at least 4 hours.
- Gently exercise the treated muscles by frowning, raising your eyebrows, and squinting. This helps the Botox bind to the target receptors.
- Do not touch, rub, or massage the treated areas.

First 24 Hours:
- Avoid strenuous exercise, hot showers, saunas, and alcohol.
- Do not wear hats or headbands that press on the treated area.
- Sleep on your back if possible.

First 2 Weeks:
- Results begin appearing within 3-5 days, with full effect at 10-14 days.
- Avoid facial treatments, microdermabrasion, or chemical peels for 2 weeks.
- Contact us if you notice any asymmetry after the 2-week mark for a complimentary assessment.

Your next maintenance appointment: We recommend rebooking in 3-4 months to maintain optimal results.

RF Microneedling Aftercare

Day 1:
- Redness and mild swelling are normal. Your skin may feel warm and tight.
- Apply only the post-treatment serum or moisturizer provided by our clinic.
- No makeup, active skincare (retinoids, vitamin C, AHAs/BHAs), or fragranced products.
- Avoid touching your face with unwashed hands.

Days 2-3:
- Redness begins fading. Skin may feel rough or slightly dry as micro-channels heal.
- Continue gentle, hydrating skincare only. Hyaluronic acid serum is your best friend.
- Avoid sun exposure. If you must go outdoors, use SPF 30+ mineral sunscreen.

Days 4-7:
- Most redness resolved. Makeup can be applied. Skin begins feeling smoother.
- You may gently resume your regular skincare routine, reintroducing actives gradually.

Weeks 2-12:
- Collagen remodeling is underway. Your skin will continue improving over the next 3 months.
- Wear SPF daily to protect your investment.

Next session: Schedule your next RF Microneedling treatment in 4-6 weeks for optimal results.

HydraFacial Aftercare

Immediately After:
- Your skin will have an immediate glow. Enjoy it! You can apply makeup right away if desired.
- Mild redness may be present for 30-60 minutes. This is normal.

First 24 Hours:
- Avoid exfoliating products (retinoids, AHAs, BHAs) for 24 hours to let the infused serums absorb fully.
- Stay hydrated. Drink plenty of water to support your skin from the inside.

Ongoing:
- Apply SPF 30+ daily to maintain your results.
- To maintain your glow and skin health, we recommend monthly HydraFacial treatments.

Pro tip: HydraFacial results are cumulative. Consistent monthly sessions produce dramatically better skin than occasional treatments.

Laser Hair Removal Aftercare

First 24-48 Hours:
- Mild redness and bumps around follicles are normal. Apply aloe vera gel or a cool compress.
- Avoid hot showers, saunas, steam rooms, and vigorous exercise.
- Wear loose, breathable clothing over the treated area.
- Do not apply deodorant to treated underarms for 24 hours.

First 1-3 Weeks:
- Treated hairs will begin shedding. This may look like regrowth but is actually dead hair pushing out.
- You may gently exfoliate after one week to help shedding.
- Do NOT wax, pluck, or use epilators between sessions. Shaving only.

Ongoing Between Sessions:
- Apply SPF 30+ to any treated areas exposed to sunlight.
- Avoid tanning and self-tanners between sessions.
- Shave (do not wax) 24-48 hours before your next appointment.

Next session: Your next appointment should be in 4-6 weeks. Consistency is key for optimal results.

Chemical Peel Aftercare

Days 1-2:
- Skin may feel tight, warm, or slightly stinging. This is the peel working.
- Cleanse gently with a mild, fragrance-free cleanser. Pat dry, do not rub.
- Apply a rich, fragrance-free moisturizer liberally. Vaseline or Aquaphor on areas that feel especially dry.
- No active skincare products whatsoever: no retinoids, vitamin C, AHAs, BHAs, or exfoliants.

Days 3-7:
- Peeling will begin. This may range from light flaking to more visible shedding depending on peel depth.
- Do NOT pick, pull, or peel the skin manually. Let it shed naturally.
- Continue moisturizing liberally. Your skin needs hydration support.
- Avoid makeup on actively peeling areas if possible.

Days 7-14:
- Fresh, new skin is revealed. It will be more sensitive than usual.
- Gradually reintroduce your regular skincare products, starting with the gentlest first.
- SPF 30+ is absolutely mandatory. New skin is highly susceptible to sun damage and pigmentation.

Critical: Sun protection after a chemical peel is non-negotiable. Failure to protect your skin from UV exposure can result in hyperpigmentation that is worse than your starting point. Wear SPF daily for at least 4 weeks post-peel.

Questions or Concerns?

If you experience anything unexpected or have questions about your recovery, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here for you throughout your healing process.

Call or text: {{clinic_phone}}
Email: {{clinic_email}}

BOOK YOUR NEXT APPOINTMENT

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State

Unsubscribe
plainText:
YOUR POST-{{treatment_name}} CARE GUIDE

Thank you for visiting us today, {{first_name}}.

Here is your personalized aftercare guide following your {{treatment_name}} treatment. Following these instructions carefully will help ensure the best possible results.

---

[BOTOX AFTERCARE]
First 4 Hours: Remain upright. Gently exercise treated muscles. Do not touch or massage treated areas.
First 24 Hours: Avoid exercise, hot showers, saunas, and alcohol. Sleep on your back.
First 2 Weeks: Full results at 10-14 days. Avoid facial treatments. Contact us if asymmetry is noted after 2 weeks.
Next appointment: Rebook in 3-4 months.

[RF MICRONEEDLING AFTERCARE]
Day 1: Redness and swelling normal. Use only provided post-treatment products. No makeup or active skincare.
Days 2-3: Gentle hydrating skincare only. Avoid sun.
Days 4-7: Resume regular routine gradually. Skin improves over next 3 months.
Next session: 4-6 weeks.

[HYDRAFACIAL AFTERCARE]
Immediate: Enjoy the glow. Makeup OK immediately. Mild redness fades in 30-60 min.
First 24 Hours: No exfoliants. Stay hydrated.
Ongoing: SPF daily. Monthly treatments recommended.

[LASER HAIR REMOVAL AFTERCARE]
First 24-48 Hours: Mild redness normal. No hot showers or exercise. Loose clothing.
Weeks 1-3: Hair shedding is normal. Gentle exfoliation OK after 1 week. Shaving only between sessions.
Ongoing: SPF on exposed treated areas. No tanning. Next session in 4-6 weeks.

[CHEMICAL PEEL AFTERCARE]
Days 1-2: Tight, warm skin is normal. Gentle cleanser only. Rich moisturizer. No active products.
Days 3-7: Peeling begins. Do NOT pick or pull skin. Moisturize liberally.
Days 7-14: New skin revealed. Gradually reintroduce products. SPF is mandatory.

---

QUESTIONS?
Call or text: {{clinic_phone}}
Email: {{clinic_email}}

Book your next appointment: https://ranibeautyclinic.com/book

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State
Unsubscribe: {{unsubscribe_link}}
